prompt:
Create a polished anime-style summer travel poster illustration of a cheerful original anime girl popping out from a bright resort postcard. Show a full-body young woman sitting cutely on top of a vintage cream travel trunk in the foreground, angled slightly toward the viewer. She has long golden-blonde twin-tail hair flowing in the sea breeze, sparkling amber eyes, a warm smile, rosy cheeks, and delicate jewelry. Dress her in a custom summer resort outfit: a frilly cream-and-pale-yellow crop top with a large bow, matching ruffled mini skirt, translucent mint-green shawl or capelet, flower ornaments, shell and starfish charms, ankle-wrap platform sandals, bracelets, necklace, and dangling turquoise-and-gold earrings. Add a wide woven straw sunhat decorated with white and yellow tropical flowers, ribbons, and small leaves; one hand lightly holds the brim while the other is raised near her hair.

The trunk should be a detailed antique suitcase with cream panels, tan leather straps, brass locks, reinforced corners, handle, and personalized tropical decorations including exactly 3 prominent flower-and-bow ornaments: one near the lower front left sandal area, one hanging on the front-right trunk strap, and one among the hat flowers. Behind her, create a tilted postcard or poster frame with a thin white border, as if the character is stepping out of it into the viewer’s space. The background inside the poster is a sunny luxury seaside resort with turquoise ocean, pool, palm trees, blue sky, fluffy clouds, and white Mediterranean-style buildings with blue domes and flower-covered balconies, evoking a tropical Mediterranean island resort. Use bright summer lighting, soft pastel colors, clean line art, high-detail fabric transparency, sparkling highlights, airy motion in the hair and ribbons, and a dreamy vacation atmosphere. Composition should be vertical 4:5, dynamic and slightly diagonal, with the character and trunk breaking the border of the poster. No text, no watermark, no extra characters.
promptEn:
Create a polished anime-style summer travel poster illustration of a cheerful original anime girl popping out from a bright resort postcard. Show a full-body young woman sitting cutely on top of a vintage cream travel trunk in the foreground, angled slightly toward the viewer. She has long golden-blonde twin-tail hair flowing in the sea breeze, sparkling amber eyes, a warm smile, rosy cheeks, and delicate jewelry. Dress her in a custom summer resort outfit: a frilly cream-and-pale-yellow crop top with a large bow, matching ruffled mini skirt, translucent mint-green shawl or capelet, flower ornaments, shell and starfish charms, ankle-wrap platform sandals, bracelets, necklace, and dangling turquoise-and-gold earrings. Add a wide woven straw sunhat decorated with white and yellow tropical flowers, ribbons, and small leaves; one hand lightly holds the brim while the other is raised near her hair.

The trunk should be a detailed antique suitcase with cream panels, tan leather straps, brass locks, reinforced corners, handle, and personalized tropical decorations including exactly 3 prominent flower-and-bow ornaments: one near the lower front left sandal area, one hanging on the front-right trunk strap, and one among the hat flowers. Behind her, create a tilted postcard or poster frame with a thin white border, as if the character is stepping out of it into the viewer’s space. The background inside the poster is a sunny luxury seaside resort with turquoise ocean, pool, palm trees, blue sky, fluffy clouds, and white Mediterranean-style buildings with blue domes and flower-covered balconies, evoking a tropical Mediterranean island resort. Use bright summer lighting, soft pastel colors, clean line art, high-detail fabric transparency, sparkling highlights, airy motion in the hair and ribbons, and a dreamy vacation atmosphere. Composition should be vertical 4:5, dynamic and slightly diagonal, with the character and trunk breaking the border of the poster. No text, no watermark, no extra characters.
promptZh:
创作一张精致的动漫风格夏季旅行海报插画，画面中 一位开朗的原创动漫少女 从明亮的度假明信片中跃然而出。展示一位全身年轻女性，可爱地坐在前景的一个米色复古旅行箱上，身体略微朝向观众。她拥有 飘逸的长金发双马尾，在海风中飞舞，闪烁的琥珀色眼睛，温暖的笑容，红润的脸颊以及精致的首饰。为她穿上一套定制的夏季度假装束：带有大蝴蝶结的奶油色配浅黄色荷叶边短上衣，配套的荷叶边迷你裙，半透明的薄荷绿披肩或小斗篷，花朵装饰，贝壳和海星挂饰，脚踝绑带厚底凉鞋，手链，项链以及垂坠的绿松石金耳环。戴上一顶宽大的编织草帽，装饰着白色和黄色的热带花朵、丝带和小叶子；一只手轻轻扶着帽檐，另一只手抬起靠近头发。

行李箱应为一个细节丰富的古董手提箱，带有奶油色面板、棕褐色皮带、黄铜锁扣、加固边角、提手，以及个性化的热带装饰，包括 3 个显眼的花朵蝴蝶结装饰：一个靠近左前方的凉鞋区域，一个挂在右前方的行李箱带上，另一个点缀在帽子花朵中。在她身后，创建一个倾斜的明信片或海报边框，带有细白边，仿佛角色正从画框中步入观众的空间。海报背景是一个阳光明媚的豪华海滨度假胜地，拥有绿松石色的海洋、泳池、棕榈树、蓝天、蓬松的云朵以及带有蓝色圆顶和鲜花覆盖阳台的白色地中海风格建筑，营造出 热带地中海岛屿度假村 的氛围。使用明亮的夏季光影，柔和的粉彩色调，干净的线条，高细节的织物透明感，闪烁的高光，头发和丝带的飘逸动感，以及梦幻般的度假氛围。构图应为 4:5 竖版，具有动态感和轻微的对角线倾斜，角色和行李箱需打破海报边框。无文字，无水印，无额外角色。
